aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to the absence of structured data and conversational content, but with improvements, they could become a top recommendation.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to provide AI with structured business information.
Create an FAQ section addressing common HVAC queries to capture AI attention for question-based searches.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized but missing a phone number, which is critical for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Phone number not listed in GBP.
Could benefit from more regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost local SEO.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Consider adding the phone number to the Google Business Profile.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing them as a reliable local HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries where AI prioritizes structured data and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with essential business details.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for local HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, causing AI to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement schema markup, develop FAQ content, and enhance GBP to align with AI search trends and capture more leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months of optimization.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.
